title: Cisco stack extras (stackring, catalyst state, distributed stack ports)
name: cisco
description:
Additional Cisco checks not shipped by Checkmk core:
- StackWise ring redundancy (cisco_stackring)
- Per-switch role and state for Cisco StackWise stacks not covered by the built-in cisco_stack detection (catalyst_switch_state)
- Distributed stack port operational status (cisco_distr_stack_port)
author: Kuhn & Rueß GmbH
